perception: The patient understands that the treatment is intended to target the tumour in a focused way, but is anxious about what the day will feel like.
notes: Prefers simple explanations and reassurance before technical details.

perception: The patient has a general idea of the scan but wants to know how long it takes and whether it is uncomfortable.
notes: Respond best to short, step-by-step answers.

perception: The patient knows dosimetry is used to personalise care but does not want numerical details right now.
notes: Avoid technical measurement values and keep the explanation gentle.
